programs.name: CalWORKs Housing Support Program
programs.description: Rental assistance, security deposit help, and case management for CalWORKs-eligible families.
programs.eligibility_summary: Low-income families with children on CalWORKs

programs.name: Housing Choice Voucher Program (Section 8)
programs.description: Federally funded rental assistance - pay roughly 30% of household income toward rent.
programs.eligibility_summary: Low-income households; long waitlists in most counties

programs.name: California Emergency Rental Assistance Program
programs.description: Past-due rent and utility assistance for eligible households at risk of eviction.
programs.eligibility_summary: Households experiencing financial hardship; income below 80% of area median

programs.name: Project Roomkey / Project Homekey
programs.description: Interim and permanent housing for individuals and families experiencing homelessness or housing instability.
programs.eligibility_summary: Experiencing or at risk of homelessness

programs.name: Bay Area Legal Aid
programs.description: Free legal help for low-income tenants - eviction defence, security deposit disputes, habitability claims.
programs.eligibility_summary: Low-income residents of the SF Bay Area

programs.name: Legal Aid Foundation of Los Angeles
programs.description: Free legal services for tenants in LA County - including landlord-tenant disputes, eviction defence, fair housing.

programs.name: California Tenant Protection Act (AB 1482)
programs.description: Caps annual rent increases at 5% + local CPI (max 10%) for many California tenancies. Worth knowing if your lease has rent increase language.
programs.eligibility_summary: Most California tenants in buildings 15+ years old

programs.name: Tenants Together
programs.description: Statewide nonprofit advocating for tenant rights - referrals to local legal aid and tenant unions.

programs.name: California Veterans Cal-Vet Home Loan
programs.description: Low-interest home loan program for veterans transitioning out of renting.

programs.name: California Department of Aging - Senior Housing Information
programs.description: Information on senior-specific housing programs, rent caps, and elder abuse protections.
